subcodes.first_line: O thou handmaid aflame with the fire of God's love! Grieve thou not over the troubles and hardships of this nether world… Rely upon God. Trust in Him. Praise Him
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امه الله المشتعله بنار محبته لاتحزنی من العسره و العناء و لاتفرحی من
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @material world a reflection of the spiritual, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
